title: SunPump
mainTitle: One-call agent token launch, paid via x402
subtitle: Create a meme or agent token from structured metadata.
description:
## What it does

SunPump Agent Token Launch API lets agents, scripts, and applications pay with x402 and submit token launch metadata to SunPump. The gateway forwards the caller's JSON payload to the SunPump launch endpoint after payment settlement.

## Best for

- Agent workflows that need to create a meme or agent token from structured metadata.
- Operator tools that want one paid API call for token creation.
- Testnet payment flows across TRON and BSC while using the same SunPump launch request shape.

## Request shape

POST a JSON body with `name`, `symbol`, `description`, `imageBase64`, `twitterUrl`, `telegramUrl`, `websiteUrl`, and `tweetUsername`. Keep `name` within 1-20 characters and use a unique symbol. `imageBase64` may include a base64-encoded token image; if it is empty or omitted, SunPump generates an image automatically.

## Code usage

Use `x402-cli pay` against the route for the testnet payment chain you want. TRON Nile Testnet example:

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/sunpump-token-launch-tron/pump-api/ai/agentTokenLaunch' \
  --method POST \
  --network tron:nile \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact \
  --max-amount 0.000001 \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --body '{"name":"X402MainA","symbol":"X4M17","description":"x402 launch","imageBase64":"","twitterUrl":"","telegramUrl":"","websiteUrl":"","tweetUsername":""}'
```

BSC Testnet uses `sunpump-token-launch-bsc` with `eip155:97` and the same JSON body.
useCase: Use this provider when an app, agent, or CLI workflow needs to launch a SunPump token after a successful x402 payment. Choose the route matching the intended testnet payment chain: TRON Nile Testnet or BSC Testnet.

zh-CN.title: SunPump
zh-CN.subtitle: з”Ёз»“жһ„еҢ–е…ғж•°жҚ®дёҖж¬Ўд»ҳиҙ№еҸ‘еёҒ(meme/Agent д»ЈеёҒ)гҖӮ
zh-CN.description:
## иғҪеҒҡд»Җд№Ҳ

SunPump Agent еҸ‘еёҒ API е…Ғи®ё AgentгҖҒи„ҡжң¬е’Ңеә”з”Ёе…Ҳе®ҢжҲҗ x402 ж”Ҝд»ҳпјҢеҶҚжҠҠеҸ‘еёҒе…ғж•°жҚ®жҸҗдәӨз»ҷ SunPumpгҖӮGateway еңЁж”Ҝд»ҳз»“з®—еҗҺжҠҠи°ғз”Ёж–№зҡ„ JSON иҜ·жұӮдҪ“иҪ¬еҸ‘еҲ° SunPump еҸ‘еёҒжҺҘеҸЈгҖӮ

## йҖӮеҗҲеңәжҷҜ

- йңҖиҰҒеҹәдәҺз»“жһ„еҢ–е…ғж•°жҚ®еҲӣе»ә meme token жҲ– agent token зҡ„ Agent е·ҘдҪңжөҒгҖӮ
- еёҢжңӣз”ЁдёҖж¬Ўд»ҳиҙ№ API и°ғз”Ёе®ҢжҲҗеҸ‘еёҒзҡ„иҝҗиҗҘе·Ҙе…·гҖӮ
- еңЁ TRON е’Ң BSC жөӢиҜ•зҪ‘дёҠдҪҝз”ЁеҗҢдёҖеҘ— SunPump еҸ‘еёҒиҜ·жұӮж јејҸйӘҢиҜҒж”Ҝд»ҳжөҒзЁӢгҖӮ

## иҜ·жұӮж јејҸ

POST JSON иҜ·жұӮдҪ“еҢ…еҗ« `name`гҖҒ`symbol`гҖҒ`description`гҖҒ`imageBase64`гҖҒ`twitterUrl`гҖҒ`telegramUrl`гҖҒ`websiteUrl` е’Ң `tweetUsername`гҖӮ`name` йңҖиҰҒдҝқжҢҒеңЁ 1-20 дёӘеӯ—з¬ҰеҶ…пјҢе№¶дҪҝз”Ёе”ҜдёҖ symbolгҖӮ`imageBase64` еҸҜд»Ҙдј е…Ҙ base64 зј–з Ғзҡ„ token еӣҫзүҮпјӣеҰӮжһңдёәз©әжҲ–дёҚдј пјҢSunPump дјҡиҮӘеҠЁз”ҹжҲҗеӣҫзүҮгҖӮ

## д»Јз Ғз”Ёжі•

дҪҝз”Ё `x402-cli pay` и°ғз”Ёзӣ®ж ҮжөӢиҜ•зҪ‘ж”Ҝд»ҳй“ҫеҜ№еә”зҡ„и·Ҝз”ұгҖӮTRON Nile жөӢиҜ•зҪ‘зӨәдҫӢпјҡ

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/sunpump-token-launch-tron/pump-api/ai/agentTokenLaunch' \
  --method POST \
  --network tron:nile \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact \
  --max-amount 0.000001 \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --body '{"name":"X402MainA","symbol":"X4M17","description":"x402 launch","imageBase64":"","twitterUrl":"","telegramUrl":"","websiteUrl":"","tweetUsername":""}'
```

BSC жөӢиҜ•зҪ‘дҪҝз”Ё `sunpump-token-launch-bsc` е’Ң `eip155:97`пјҢиҜ·жұӮдҪ“зӣёеҗҢгҖӮ
zh-CN.useCase: йҖӮеҗҲеә”з”ЁгҖҒAgent жҲ– CLI жөҒзЁӢеңЁ x402 ж”Ҝд»ҳжҲҗеҠҹеҗҺи°ғз”Ё SunPump еҸ‘еёҒжҺҘеҸЈгҖӮж №жҚ®жөӢиҜ•зҪ‘ж”Ҝд»ҳй“ҫйҖүжӢ© TRON Nile жөӢиҜ•зҪ‘жҲ– BSC жөӢиҜ•зҪ‘и·Ҝз”ұгҖӮ

endpoints.title: Launch Agent Token
endpoints.subtitle: Create a SunPump token from metadata
endpoints.description: Submit token metadata to SunPump after x402 payment settlement. `imageBase64` can carry a base64-encoded token image; when it is empty or omitted, SunPump generates an image automatically. The response includes SunPump status and token data such as token id, owner address, contract address, logo URL, create transaction hash, reserves, and market data when available.
endpoints.useCase: Use this endpoint when an agent or backend has already validated launch metadata and is ready to create the token.

zh-CN.title: Agent еҸ‘еёҒ
zh-CN.subtitle: ж №жҚ®е…ғж•°жҚ®еҲӣе»ә SunPump token
zh-CN.description: еңЁ x402 ж”Ҝд»ҳз»“з®—еҗҺеҗ‘ SunPump жҸҗдәӨеҸ‘еёҒе…ғж•°жҚ®гҖӮ`imageBase64` еҸҜд»ҘжҗәеёҰ base64 зј–з Ғзҡ„ token еӣҫзүҮпјӣдёәз©әжҲ–дёҚдј ж—¶пјҢSunPump дјҡиҮӘеҠЁз”ҹжҲҗеӣҫзүҮгҖӮе“Қеә”еҢ…еҗ« SunPump зҠ¶жҖҒе’Ң token ж•°жҚ®пјҢдҫӢеҰӮ token idгҖҒowner addressгҖҒcontract addressгҖҒlogo URLгҖҒcreate transaction hashгҖҒеӮЁеӨҮе’ҢеёӮеңәж•°жҚ®зӯүгҖӮ
